arts.ttl: Manchester United officials meet fan group determined to oust Glazer family from Old Trafford
arts.sum: A Man Utd fan group who organised protests against the Glazers have launched a new coalition to represent the views of supporters.

arts.ttl: Diogo Dalot explains why he has a strong bond with Man United fans after struggles
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Diogo Dalot has been impressive so far this season and has started in each of the Red Devils' first 11 matches across all competitions

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag press conference live Manchester United updates and team news for Brentford fixture
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag will speak to the media on Friday ahead of Man Utd's game against Brentford in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all seven games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday eight this weekend and James Mason has highlighted our writers' best bets for all seven games taking place in the top-flight on Saturday.

arts.ttl: PL Predictions: Shock defeats for Man Utd & Man City
arts.sum: Our football betting expert Jones Knows provides his insight across the Premier League card as he goes bold, making a case for Wolves to beat Man City.

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo injury: Ten Hag suffers HUGE blow as Man Utd lose England star
arts.sum: The 19-year-old missed the international break with England last week because of the injury he suffered in the 0-0 draw against Aston Villa earlier this month. Mainoo may not feature again for United until December, reports The Times, leaving under-pressure Ten Hag with a selection headache.

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo injury latest with predicted return date and Man United replacement options
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United injury news - amid an unwanted setback for England midfielder Kobbie Mainoo.

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted XI vs Brentford as injury crisis causes huge headache for Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Manchester United are without some key players for their Premier League match against Brentford on Saturday, with midfield a particular area of concern for Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: Man Utd's Erik ten Hag succession plan gets green light from Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester United chiefs are said to be impressed by the work Thomas Frank has done at Brentford ahead of their clash against the London outfit this weekend, and Pep Guardiola is a big admirer of the Dane too

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson opens up on stepping down at Man United and decision to call it quits
arts.sum: At times, it seemed like Sir Alex Ferguson would be at Manchester United forever having spent close to 30 years in the dugout of the Red Devils
